_doc: Epic #3392 AC3 — the bounded, enumerated set of human touchpoints the harness retains. EVERYTHING ELSE is operator-or-cross-model territory (route to the #3401 adjudication-guardrail, never a bare client prompt). A new client-prompt surface absent from `sanctioned_ask_surfaces` is flagged by scripts/global/megalint/client-prompt-surface-check.js (advisory; promotion replay-eval-gated).

carve_outs.description: New architecture / scope expansion / visual design direction — the client's correct role (operator-identity contract).
UAT visual confirmation that shipped behavior matches user expectation — the client's correct role.
Irreversible / destructive real-world action (e.g. permanent deletion, force-push to main, dropping a production database).
Deliberate weakening of a security/governance control, or genuine secret-exposure — never auto-executed (anti-goal §6).
